headers.value: default-src 'self' https://telegram.org https://unpkg.com https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://telegram.org https://unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://your-backend.railway.app; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src blob: mediastream:; frame-ancestors 'none'
